review_title: A Versatile Solution for Streamlined Service Management
author: Aiden A.
pros: Service Pilot has a comprehensive feature list that contains everything you could need in a service management tool. I have used it briefly in preparation for a personal project, and used it as a user.
cons: There seems to be fairly limited integration features as well as a complex initial setup process that may make some users stray away.

description: For over 10 years, we have used ServicePilot to monitor our entire Wan and Lan network as well as for our IBM mainframe business.
author: Jolivet F.
pros: For ease of installation and customization as well as very good support. ServicePilot allows you to supervise and automate a wide range of products from different brands.
cons: There is not much to reproach this product, the slightest problems encountered are quickly resolved by the support.

description: Support is very important and easy to reach, the team are always available for help! Tjis is very important when we install it few years ago, and support team was near us all days where we need help!
author: Thierry B.
pros: This software could be defined with your specific configuration it's not a standard we can build exactly what we need
cons: For real time statistics on check call quality when you system is big for telephony sometime it's slow when you need to active filter

author: Sylvain L.
pros: Servicepilot is complete in terms of supervision, the advantage is the creation of packages and the ability to monitor all equipment
cons: The negative points are the use of shortcuts, the inability to modify a packaged view

description: le service est très réactif et est capable d'intégrer rapidement de nouveaux équipements au travers de packages adaptés
author: Frederic E.
pros: La simplicité du produit, les nombreux constructeurs disponibles dans les packages, la possibilité de créer ses propres packages
cons: Les nouvelles versions sont parfois pas totalement testées et la migration est parfois compliquées

description: Nous sommes très satisfait de la solution et du support Service Pilot qui nous aide avec beaucoup de réactivité et compétences
author: Frederic R.
pros: La rapidité de mise en oeuvre, les fonctionnalités de la solution et les différents wigdet qui facilitent l'intégration.
cons: La prise en main de la solution nécessite une période d'apprentissage et d'adaptation.

description: ServicePilot is mostly used for our end customers voice monitoring and quality. Real benefit in visibilty. Is able to detect security issues on voice networks.
author: Olivier V.
pros: Ease of use and deploy. Flexibility. Customizability. Performance. Perpetual improvements. Support team availability and efficiency.
cons: request knowledge of products that will be monitored by this software. Must practice regularly to be efficient with the product.
